summary: Self-driving freight truck technology company Einride rose significant in its first day of trading on the Nasdaq after a SPAC deal.（原题：Autonomous EV freight trucking company Einride rises sharply in first trade on Nasdaq）

title: 机器人技术不会有干净的骆驼时刻
summary: The Llama moment in robotics will not be the day a policy becomes downloadable. It will be the day another team can take that policy, adapt it to its robot, release it into a customer process, and still know what failed weeks later when the line stops repeating. The post Robotics will not have a clean Llama moment appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Robotics will not have a clean Llama moment）

title: 工厂机器人初创公司 Mujin 在 2030 年 IPO 前筹集资金
